passive.name: Shurima's Legacy
passive.description: Azir can summon the Disc of the Sun from the ruins of allied or enemy turrets.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Azir}} periodically can summon the {{as|Disc of the Sun|buzzword2}} from the ruins of allied or enemy {{tip|turret|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{as|Disc of the Sun|buzzword2}} functions as a turret that decays over time, and weakens when '''Azir''' leaves it.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever a {{tip|turret}} outside the enemy team's base is destroyed, a marker is placed above its ruins which can be targeted by '''Azir'''.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Disc of the Sun:}} '''Azir''' can select a marker to construct the {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}} above the ruins after a {{fd|0.5}}-second [[cast time]]. The {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}} will activate after being assembled over 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: The {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}} functions the same as a standard [[Turret#Inner_turret|inner turret]] but deals {{as|magic damage}}, gains {{as|40% AP}} {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}}, and grants its kill credit to '''Azir'''. The {{as|Sun Disc's|buzzword2}} {{sti|{{as|health}}}} decays over 45 seconds and loses {{sti|armor|{{as|100 armor}}}} and {{sti|magic resistance|{{as|100 magic resistance}}}} while '''Azir''' is not alive or is too far away.
wiki_detail.description4: '''''Azir''' cannot construct a {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}} with the marker while he is unable to cast abilities.''
wiki_detail.description5: ''See [[Azir/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about the {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}}.''
wiki_detail.differences:
;{{tip|Ascension}} differences:
* '''Azir''' can summon a {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}} in the center of the map provided the {{ci|Xerath|Ancient Ascended}} is dead. The {{as|Sun Disc|buzzword2}} will be destroyed if the ''Ancient Ascended'' respawns while active.

Q.name: Conquering Sands
Q.description: Azir sends all Sand Soldiers towards a location. Sand Soldiers deal magic damage to enemies they pass through and apply a slow for 1 second.
Q.tooltip: Azir orders all Sand Soldiers to an area, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to enemies they pass through and Slowing them by {{ e2 }}% for 1 second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Azir}} sends all {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} to dash towards a location. They deal {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow}} enemies they pass through.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Azir''' orders all {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} to dash toward the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies they pass through as well as those in front of them upon arrival, and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 25% for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies hit by subsequent soldiers take no additional damage and are instead {{tip|slow|slowed}} by an additional 25% per soldier.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Conquering Sands will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|260|End of dash stab length, measured}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|140|Dashing soldier missile width}} / {{tt|100|End of dash stab width}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} dash about 50 units further away from Azir than the target location, making them stab targets slightly further away.
* {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} will stop their movement upon colliding with {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} but not with {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}}.

W.name: Arise!
W.description: Azir summons a Sand Soldier to attack nearby targets for him, replacing his basic attack against targets within the soldier's range. Their attacks deal magic damage to enemies in a line.
W.tooltip:
Azir summons a Sand Soldier for {{ e1 }} seconds. When Azir Attacks an enemy near a Sand Soldier, he instead orders the soldiers to stab, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage in their direction.

This Ability has {{ maxammo }} charges.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Azir}} summons a {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}} to attack nearby targets for him, replacing his {{tip|basic attack|basic attacks}} against enemies within their range. Their attacks deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemies in a line.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} expire faster near {{tip|turrets}} and instantly when {{ci|Azir}} leaves them.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Azir''' summons a {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}} at the target location that is {{tip|untargetable}}, lasts 10 seconds, and grants {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. The {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}} expires twice as fast while within range of an enemy {{tip|turret}}, and does so instantly if '''Azir''' is too far away.

'''Azir''' periodically [[stock]]s a {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}}, up to a maximum of 2.
wiki_detail.description2: When '''Azir''' declares a basic attack against an enemy in a soldier's {{sti|attack range}}, the {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}} attacks in his stead, thrusting their spear in the target's direction to deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemies struck in a line and applying {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects against the primary target at 50% effectiveness. Targets hit beyond the closest take {{pp|key=%|25 to 100 for 4|1 to 16}} damage. Subsequent {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} against the same target deal 25% damage.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Arise! will cast at max range if cast beyond that. See [[Azir/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}}.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The Sand Soldier's attack will be mitigated by {{tip|block}} and {{tip|dodge}} but not {{tip|blind}}.
* {{tip|Nearsight|Nearsighting}} effects will only allow '''Azir''' to perform attacks from soldiers within his own sight radius.
* '''Azir''' must rank ''Arise!'' as his first ability, and will do so automatically if he reaches level 2 before ranking an ability.
* '''Azir''' can only command his soldiers to attack if he is able to declare [[basic attack]] commands himself, meaning {{tip|crowd control}} effects that disable attacking, such as {{tip|disarm}}, do not allow him to order his soldiers to attack in his stead.
* Damage to enemy champions from ''Sand Soldier'' stabs will draw minion aggro even if the enemy champion was not the primary target.{{bug|2}}
* Commanding a soldier to attack will trigger {{tip|on-attack}} effects, but will not apply any of these effects to the target hit.
* {{as|Sand Soldiers|buzzword2}} will attack the closest enemy to '''Azir''' when using attack move (or {{sbc|A + RMB}} / {{sbc|Shift + RMB}}) or {{tip|acquisition radius|auto-attack}}.
[[File:Azir_Sand_Soldier_screenshot.png|thumb|left|250px|An exclamation mark ('''!''') will appear above the {{as|'''Sand Soldier's'''|buzzword2}} head when within the range of an enemy {{tip|turret}}.]]

E.name: Shifting Sands
E.description: Azir shields himself briefly and dashes to one of his Sand Soldiers, damaging enemies. If he hits an enemy champion, he instantly readies a new Sand Soldier for deployment and halts his dash.
E.tooltip:
Azir grants himself {{ totalshield }} Shield for {{ e6 }} seconds and dashes to one of his Sand Soldiers, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to enemies he passes through.

If Azir hits an enemy champion, he stops and gains a Sand Soldier charge.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Azir}} {{tip|shield|shields}} himself and {{tip|dash|dashes}} to the target {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies he passes through.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He will stop upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}}, gaining a charge of ''{{ai|Arise!|Azir}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Azir''' grants himself a {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds and {{tip|dashes}} to the target {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within his path.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Shield Strength|{{ap|70 to 230}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|60 to 220}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: If '''Azir''' dashes into an enemy {{tip|champion}}, he stops and gains a charge of ''{{ai|Arise!|Azir}}''.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Azir''' can cast of any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes: * '''Azir''' will track the {{as|Sand Soldier|buzzword2}} if they change locations, such as by {{ai|Conquering Sands|Azir}}.

R.name: Emperor's Divide
R.description: Azir summons a wall of soldiers which charge forward, knocking back and damaging enemies.
R.tooltip: Azir summons a wall of armored soldiers that charges forward, Knocking Back enemies and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. The soldiers remain, blocking enemy paths for {{ e4 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Azir}} summons a wall of soldiers that charges forward, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|airborne|knocking back}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The soldiers will linger for a few seconds, acting as terrain against enemies while allowing allies to pass.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Azir''' calls forth a phalanx of soldiers from {{tt|175|See notes}} units behind him, catching enemies from up to {{tt|325|See notes}} units behind him and charging forward {{tt|575|See notes}} units in the target direction.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Width|{{ap|6 to 8}} soldiers|Width (charge)|{{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{ap|620 to 820}}|Width (impassable wall)|{{tip|pathing radius|icononly = true}} {{ap|750 to 950}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies impacted by the charge are dealt {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|airborne|knocked away}} over 1 second to a line 650 units in front of '''Azir'''.
wiki_detail.description3: Upon finishing their charge, the soldiers stand as a wall for 5 seconds, acting as impassible terrain against enemies and granting {{tip|sight}} of their surroundings. '''Azir''' and his allies can move through these soldiers.
wiki_detail.target range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|400|Charge distance in front of Azir, wall location}} / {{tt|-325|Starting location behind Azir, see notes}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|125|Soldier radius, 'lollipop' radius where they come to halt}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The soldier units are spawned only 175 units behind '''Azir''', but do not control the {{tip|airborne|knock back}} directly. Each comes with a missile that travels the same path and conveys the damage and knockback effect.
** The furthest area (from 325 to 175 units behind '''Azir''') is covered by a separate set of missiles with the same effects.
** All of the soldiers and their missiles will end the charge prematurely when one encounters {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} / {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}} / {{ai|Blade Whirl|Samira}} or upon colliding with terrain that they cannot charge through.
* The charge starts at {{fd|0.25}} seconds into the cast time.
{{Effect at cast time start}}
* When the dash of the soldiers comes to a halt, all not-yet-affected enemies on top of the soldiers' landing locations (125 radius) are also knocked back.
* ''Emperor's Divide'' will not be canceled if '''Azir''' dies during the cast time.
* While the soldiers are charging forward, the wall is not impassable terrain. 
** This means enemies that are immune to {{tip|airborne}} effects can pass through the wall while its moving.
* The wall '''will''' count as terrain for the purposes of 'into terrain' effects (e.g. {{ai|Condemn|Vayne}}, {{ai|Dredge Line|Nautilus}}, {{ai|Heroic Charge|Poppy}}). This will only affect enemies, allies will pass through the wall in all circumstances, even if knocked into it by an enemy.
